941:quarter.label: Quarter
941:quarter.so: Tani waa rubucii sannadka ee soo gudbintaani ka hadlayso.
941:quarter.en: This is which quarter of the year this filing covers.

941:line1.label: Number of employees
941:line1.so: Tani waa tirada shaqaalaha ee mushahar ka heshay rubuca canshuurta.
941:line1.en: This is the number of employees who received pay during the quarter.

941:line2.label: Total wages paid
941:line2.so: Tani waa wadarta guud ee mushaharka, khadarka, iyo lacagaha kale ee shirkadda u bixisay shaqaalaha rubucan.
941:line2.en: This is the total wages, tips, and other compensation the business paid employees this quarter.

941:line3.label: Federal tax withheld
941:line3.so: Tani waa wadarta canshuurta federaalka ah ee shirkaddu ka jartay mushaharka shaqaalaha rubucan.
941:line3.en: This is the total federal income tax the business withheld from employees' pay this quarter.

941:line5a.label: Social security wages
941:line5a.so: Tani waa wadarta mushaharka ee loo xisaabiyo canshuurta Social Security.
941:line5a.en: This is the total wages counted toward Social Security tax.

941:line5c.label: Medicare wages
941:line5c.so: Tani waa wadarta mushaharka ee loo xisaabiyo canshuurta Medicare.
941:line5c.en: This is the total wages counted toward Medicare tax.

941:line6.label: Total taxes before adjustments
941:line6.so: Tani waa wadarta canshuurta federaalka, Social Security, iyo Medicare ka hor inta aan hagaajin lagu darin.
941:line6.en: This is the total of federal income tax, Social Security tax, and Medicare tax before any adjustments.

941:line12.label: Total tax liability
941:line12.so: Tani waa wadarta guud ee canshuurta shirkaddu lugta ku haysato rubucan.
941:line12.en: This is the total tax the business owes for this quarter.

941:line13.label: Total deposits
941:line13.so: Tani waa wadarta lacagaha shirkaddu horay u dhigtay sanduuqa canshuurta rubucan.
941:line13.en: This is the total tax deposits the business already made for this quarter.

941:line14.label: Balance due
941:line14.so: Tani waa lacagta shirkaddu weli ka bixin lahayd canshuurta rubucan.
941:line14.en: This is the remaining tax balance the business still owes for this quarter.

941:line15.label: Overpayment
941:line15.soTitle: Lacag dheeraad ah oo la bixiyay
941:line15.so: Tani waa lacagta shirkaddu ka bixisay in ka badan canshuurta lugta ku haysatay rubucan.
941:line15.en: This is the amount the business paid in excess of what it owed for this quarter.
